description: Context portability MCP server for compressing, formatting, and resuming AI conversation handoffs.
name: io.github.prateekg7/context-bridge

environmentVariables.description: Optional BYOK API key for the OpenAI Responses or chat-completions lane.
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional model override for the OpenAI BYOK lane.
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional hosted inference endpoint for the no-key lane.
environmentVariables.name: CONTEXTBRIDGE_HOSTED_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional auth key for the hosted inference endpoint.
environmentVariables.name: CONTEXTBRIDGE_HOSTED_API_KEY
